name: The Solstice Row
address: 5100 Patricia Bay Highway, Victoria, BC V8Y 2T6
description: Hosted by the Victoria City Rowing Club and open to all rowers at Victoria Rowing Society and guests from other clubs — the Elk Lake Summer Solstice Row is a dawn-to-dusk fundraising endurance challenge. Teams and individuals row and erg continuously from sunrise to sunset, raising pledges per kilometer for fleet replacement and equipment.
heroSubtitle: Raise pledges per kilometer. Enter as a team or individual. All ages welcome!
cause: Fleet replacement (boats), oars, and coaching equipment (radios, megaphones).
format: Teams share one boat and one erg. No simultaneous rowing and erging. Hand-tag all transitions. Row the full Elk Lake loop pattern, switching to the erg between boat runs. Log start/stop times with GPS and erg PM5 screenshots.
